bead.title: Stage 3.5: install UI primitives — bits-ui + lucide-svelte + mode-watcher + Tailwind
bead.description: `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun add bits-ui lucide-svelte mode-watcher`. Initialize Tailwind: tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, src/app.css with @tailwind directives. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #31.
bead.acceptance: (1) All primitives installed. (2) MANUAL: create a tiny test page with a Button from bits-ui and a User icon from lucide-svelte. Navigate to it in `bun run dev`, see both render. Click the dark-mode toggle (mode-watcher), see theme switch. Record in completion note.
